member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EMDefOf.EM_FirstLactationDrug
member.summary: 首次药物诱发泌乳成就类记忆。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EMDefOf.EM_FirstLactationBirth
member.summary: 首次分娩泌乳成就类记忆。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EMDefOf.EM_LongTermDrugLactation
member.summary: 长期药物泌乳情境心情（药物诱发且持续约 15 天以上）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EMDefOf.EM_NursedBy
member.summary: 3.1：被哺乳者获得「被某人哺乳」记忆，用于社交/关系。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EMDefOf.EM_NursedSomeone
member.summary: 3.1：哺乳者获得「哺乳了某人」记忆，用于社交/关系。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingDefaultsDef
member.summary: 建议 22：关键默认值 Def，供「从 Def 加载默认」使用；若 XML 未加载则用 GetBuiltinDefaults()。其他 mod 可 patch GetBuiltinDefaults 改内置值。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingDefaultsDef.defaultFlowMultiplierForHumanlike
member.summary: 流速倍率；默认 2 = 单次剂量约 1 日灌满。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingDefaultsDef.GetBuiltinDefaults
member.summary: 内置默认值（当 XML 未加载时使用；其他 mod 可 patch 此方法修改）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.milkingWorkTotalBase
member.summary: 按容量量化：挤奶工作量基准（原版 400），实际工作量 = 基准 × 容量系数。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.milkingCapacityFactor
member.summary: 按容量量化：挤奶工作量随 MilkAmount 的系数，work *= (1 + 本值×(MilkAmount-1))，限制在 [0.5, 2.5]。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.breastfeedCapacityFactor
member.summary: 按容量量化：吸奶有效时间随喂奶者 MilkAmount 的系数，effectiveTime *= (1 + 本值×(MilkAmount-1))，限制在 [0.5, 2]。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.lactationExtraNutritionBasis
member.summary: 泌乳灌满期间额外饥饿：滑块 0–300，150=1:1。饱食度每 150 tick 额外下降 = flowPerDay×(150/60000)×(本值/150)。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.reabsorbNutritionEnabled
member.summary: 回缩吸收：满池回缩时，未溢出部分视为被身体吸收，按比例补充饱食度；0=关闭，1=与产奶消耗 1:1 折算。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.reabsorbNutritionEfficiency
member.summary: 回缩吸收效率：0~1，吸收的池单位折成营养的比例，默认 0.5 避免满池挂机过强。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.rjwBreastCapacityCoefficient
member.summary: 乳房容量系数：左右乳容量 = RJW Severity × 本系数，2=默认，与泌乳效率等可调项对应。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.rjwSexAddsLactationBoost
member.summary: 3.2：性行为后为泌乳参与者增加少量池进水（ΔL），可选。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.toleranceDynamicMu
member.summary: 耐受累积率 μ（每游戏日）；L 高则 E 上升。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.toleranceDynamicNu
member.summary: 耐受衰减率 ν（每游戏日）；E 自然回落。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.ProlactinToleranceGainPerDose
member.summary: 催乳素单剂在 XML 中对耐受 Hediff 的 Severity 增量（与 Lactating 同剂叠加一致，默认 0.044）；改 XML 时需同步。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.GetEffectiveBaseValueTForDecay
member.summary: 药物泌乳衰减用有效 B_T：由 baselineMilkDurationDays 反推，使单次剂量（L≈0.5、E=1）时剩余天数 ≈ 基准天数。D=0.5/baseline ⇒ B_T_eff=1/(0.5/baseline−k×0.5)。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.GetPressureFactor(System.Single)
member.summary: 四层模型：压力因子 PressureFactor(P)=1/(1+exp(b×(P−Pc)))，且不低于 pressureFactorMin，以便满池时仍有进水流速、溢出能发生。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.GetEffectiveDrive(System.Single)
member.summary: 四层模型（阶段3）：有效驱动力 D_eff = L·H(L)。H(L)=1−exp(−a·L)；若 L_ref>0 则用参考值归一：D_eff = L·(1−e^{-aL})/(1−e^{-aL_ref})，尾期更平滑。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.pressureFactorMin
member.summary: 压力因子下限：满池时 PressureFactor 不低于此值，保证仍有进水流速以便撑大/溢出能发生；0=允许压到接近 0（旧行为）。建议 0.05～0.15。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.letdownReflexDecayLambda
member.summary: 喷乳反射衰减率 λ（每分钟）；R_new = R × exp(-λ×Δt)。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.letdownReflexStimulusDeltaR
member.summary: 挤奶/吸奶时 R 的增量 ΔR，Clamp 后 R≤1。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.letdownReflexMin
member.summary: 喷乳反射 R 的下限：R 衰减不低于此值，避免「不挤奶则产奶效率归零」；0=允许归零。当启用加成倍率时 R 可衰减到 0。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.letdownReflexBoostMultiplier
member.summary: 喷乳反射加成倍率：吸奶/挤奶后进水量 = 基础 × (1 + R×(本值-1))，R=1 时为本值倍（1.5~2.5），R=0 时为 1 倍；维持时间由 R 衰减速度决定。≤1 时按旧逻辑（流速×R，且受 R 下限约束）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.lactationDecayInflammationEta
member.summary: 炎症对 L 衰减的抑制因子 η：D += η·I。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.hormoneSaturationA
member.summary: H(L) 饱和系数 a；建议 0.5～1.5。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.hormoneSaturationLRef
member.summary: 参考 L 归一：D_eff = L·(1−e^{-aL})/(1−e^{-aL_ref})，使尾期更平滑；≤0 时不归一。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.adaptationTheta
member.summary: 扩容率 θ（每游戏日）；P 大于 0.85 时容量增加。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.adaptationOmega
member.summary: 回缩率 ω（每游戏日）；P 小于 1 时容量减少。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.adaptationCapMaxRatio
member.summary: 适应容量上限：不超过基础容量的此比例（如 0.2=20%）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.milkQualityInflammationWeight
member.summary: 炎症对质量的抑制系数；质量 ∝ (1 − 本值×I)，I 大则质量降。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.milkQualityProtectionFactor
member.summary: 质量对乳腺炎阈值的保护系数；有效 I_crit = I_crit×(1 + 本值×MilkQuality)。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.EnsureScribeDeepTypes
member.summary: 确保 Scribe_Deep 反序列化的对象类型正确，避免旧存档或类型变更导致 InvalidCastException。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.GetDefaultMilkProduct(Verse.ThingDef)
member.summary: 设计原则 3/4：默认产奶开关与奶量来自 Def（Humanlike/体型），不手写底层规则；实际开关由 namesToProducts + 设置决定。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.ApplyDefaultsFromDef
member.summary: 建议 22：从 EqualMilkingDefaultsDef 加载关键默认值到当前设置；若 XML 未加载则使用内置默认值（其他 mod 可 patch GetBuiltinDefaults）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.GetRaceDrugDeltaSMultiplier(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 当前催乳素耐受严重度 t ∈ [0,1]；完全由游戏内 Hediff/Comp 决定。
3.3 动物差异化：种族对催乳药物进水倍率，未配置则 1。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.GetProlactinToleranceFactor(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 统一耐受系数：E_tol(t) = max(1 − t, 0.05)。启用耐受动态时由 comp 的 E 计算。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.GetProlactinToleranceFactorFromE(System.Single)
member.summary: 耐受动态：由 mod 维护的 E 得到 E_tol = [max(1−E, 0.05)]^exponent。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Core.EqualMilkingSettings.GetProlactinToleranceFactor(System.Single)
member.summary: 统一耐受系数（按严重度 t）：E_tol(t) = [max(1 − t, 0.05)]^exponent；allowToleranceAffectMilk 关闭时恒为 1。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Core.MilkRiskSettings
member.summary: 建议 13：乳腺炎/风险与耐受相关设置分组，便于序列化与 UI；ExposeData 仍写旧 key 以兼容存档。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Core.MilkRiskSettings.mastitisMtbDaysMultiplierHumanlike
member.summary: 建议 8：人形/动物乳腺炎 MTB 乘数，便于区分平衡。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompCumBucketLink
member.summary: 精液桶/椅/泵关联床：可链接到一张床。 链接后仅床主可使用，产主精液 = 床主（即收集的精液一律记为床主产生）。 未链接时多人可使用，多人用过则为混合精液（无产主）。 若罐内已有精液且产主不是该床的床主，则无法链接到该床（CanLinkToBed 为 false，弹窗提示）。

member.name: P:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.Owner
member.summary: 床主（通过 CompAssignableToPawn 获取，兼容各版本）。

member.name: P:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.IsSharedRoom
member.summary: 共享卧室：房间内多张床，或链接的床无主。

member.name: P:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.HasContent
member.summary: 桶格上有精液物品即视为有占用。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.CanLinkToBed(RimWorld.Building_Bed)
member.summary: 桶内有精液时，仅当所有精液均属于该床主（或无产主）时才允许关联；否则返回 false 并应由调用方提示无法链接。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.CanPawnUse(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 该小人是否被允许使用此桶（做 DeflateBucket 等）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.ShouldWarnNotYourBucket(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 是否应提示“不属于他的精液桶”（有占用且不是他的桶）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.NotifyPawnUsed(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 记录该小人向此桶排放了一次；若多人用过则后续产出为混合精液。

member.name: P:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompCumBucketLink.IsMixed
member.summary: 是否已有多人使用过（产出应为混合精液）。

member.name: P:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.GatherResourcesIntervalDays
member.summary: 产出周期已移除，挤奶间隔固定为 1 天（水池模型不依赖此值）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.leftFullness
member.summary: 水池模型：左乳水位（0～左乳容量），与右乳合计 0～maxFullness；总容量 = 左+右（正常人 1+1=2）。由 SyncLeftRightFromBreastFullness 从 breastFullness 汇总。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.rightFullness
member.summary: 水池模型：右乳水位（0～右乳基础容量），与左乳合计 0～maxFullness。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.breastFullness
member.summary: 按单乳 key（Part.def.defName 或 defName_L/R）的水位，用于左1/右1/左2/右2 独立进水与展示。有则优先；无则从 left/right 反推。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.HalfPool
member.summary: 未启用 RJW 乳房尺寸时单侧固定容量 0.5；总容量 = 左 + 右。

member.name: P:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.Fullness
member.summary: 当前总奶量（0~maxFullness），双池时 = leftFullness + rightFullness；对外只读。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.allowedSucklers
member.summary: 谁可以使用我的奶。名单为空时会预填子女+伴侣；仅名单内的人可吸奶/挤奶。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.allowedConsumers
member.summary: 谁可以使用我产出的奶/精液制品（不含自己，自己始终允许）。空列表 = 仅自己；非空 = 自己+列表中人。囚犯/奴隶产主时亦不默认允许殖民者（7.4）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.overflowAccumulator
member.summary: 满池溢出：累计溢出量，达到阈值时生成地面污物（不扣水位）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.lastGatheredTick
member.summary: 10.8-6：最近一次被挤奶的游戏 tick，用于「长时间未挤奶」心情判定。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.ticksFullPool
member.summary: 规格：连续满池（Fullness≥95% maxFullness）的 tick 数，用于乳腺炎/堵塞触发。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.lastFullPoolLetterTick
member.summary: 3.3 满池事件：上次发送「需要挤奶」信件的 tick，避免刷屏。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.capacityAdaptation
member.summary: 四层模型（阶段3.2）：组织适应导致的容量增量 ≥0，maxFullness = 基础容量 + 本值。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.cachedWasLactatingWithDrugInduced
member.summary: 2.3：药物泌乳状态缓存，每 30 tick 仅状态变化时增删 EM_DrugLactationBurden/EM_LactatingGain，减少重复查找。

member.name: P:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.OverflowAccumulator
member.summary: 满池溢出累计量（仅 Debug 显示用）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.GetFullnessForKey(System.String)
member.summary: 按 key 取该乳当前水位，用于健康页悬停等；无该 key 时返回 0。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.GetReabsorbedNutritionPerDay
member.summary: 回缩吸收：当前若有任一侧水位超过基础容量，每 30 tick 会回缩一部分（不溢出）；本方法将该回缩量折算为「每日补充营养」，供 Need_Food 补丁增加饱食度。仅当设置开启且存在回缩时返回 > 0。

member.name: P:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.LastGatheredTick
member.summary: 10.8-6：最近一次被挤奶的游戏 tick；供 ThoughtWorker_LongTimeNotMilked 使用。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.SyncBaseFullness
member.summary: 将双池总和同步到基类 fullness，供可能读取基类字段的代码使用。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.SyncLeftRightFromBreastFullness
member.summary: 从 per-breast 字典汇总到 leftFullness / rightFullness（按 GetBreastPoolEntries 的 IsLeft）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.ClearPools
member.summary: 泌乳结束时清空双池（由 HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating 调用）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.EnsureSaveCompatAllowedLists
member.summary: 确保列表非 null、移除无效引用；名单为空时预填子女+伴侣（默认勾选）。

member.name: P:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.Active
member.summary: 仅做纯判断，不修改健康系统。Hediff 的增删在 CompTick 的 EnsureLactatingHediffFromConditions 中执行。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.EnsureLactatingHediffFromConditions
member.summary: 根据基因/物种/设置维护 Lactating Hediff（增删与 Severity），仅在 CompTick 调用，避免 Active getter 产生副作用。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.ApplyDrugInducedLactationEffects
member.summary: 药物诱发泌乳负担与增益 Hediff；不依赖 Active，以便停止泌乳或失去耐受/成瘾时能移除。状态变化时才增删 Hediff，减少每 30 tick 的重复查找。见 Docs/泌乳系统逻辑图。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.UpdateMilkPools
member.summary: 水池模型：按对进水；每对仅当两侧都达基础容量后才允许撑大（见 Docs/泌乳系统逻辑图）。满池后不再进水（flow=0），与 GetFlowPerDay 返回 0 一致，能量有据；回缩仍执行，回缩吸收由 GetReabsorbedNutritionPerDay 折算饱食度。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.TrySendFullPoolLetter
member.summary: 3.3 满池事件：满池超过约 1 天且开启设置时，每 2 天最多发一封「需要挤奶」提醒信。见 Docs/泌乳系统逻辑图。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.HandleOverflow(System.Single)
member.summary: 满池溢出：累计溢出量达到阈值时生成地面污物（不扣水位）；污物 Def 由设置指定。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.UpdateHealthHediffs
member.summary: 满池时添加「乳房胀满」hediff；低于 90% maxFullness 时移除（滞后避免抖动）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.SetFullness(System.Single)
member.summary: 设置总奶量（0～1）。从各乳池按比例缩放到目标总水量。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.DrainForConsume(System.Single,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: 吸奶/挤奶时从池中扣量：按「哪对最满」优先（总满度高的对先扣），同对内先扣较满的一侧，相同时先左（与性别无关）。见 Docs/泌乳系统逻辑图；记忆库/design/双池与PairIndex、记忆库/decisions/ADR-003-选侧先左。
member.param: 要扣的池单位量（与 Charge/Fullness 同单位）
若非 null，会填入本次被扣量的池侧 key（用于按侧加喷乳反射刺激）

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.Gathered(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 挤奶：从所有乳房对按顺序扣量（与 DrainForConsume 一致），再按实际扣量产出奶。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.TryTriggerMastitis
member.summary: 规格：乳腺炎/堵塞可由长时间满池、卫生、受伤等触发。每 2000 tick 判定一次；参数由 EqualMilkingSettings 可调；营养好则 MTB 延长（风险降低）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompEquallyMilkable.AllowedToBeAutoFedBy(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 是否允许被该泌乳者自动喂食。仅看 canBeFed 开关；不再使用「谁可以喂我」列表。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.CompShowProducer.CompInspectStringExtra
member.summary: 物品悬浮/检查面板：显示产主与允许使用名单（只读现有 Comp 数据），减少重复点进设置。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.HediffComp_AbsorptionDelayTip
member.summary: 吸收延迟 hediff 悬停时显示距最早一批泌乳生效的剩余时间。见 Docs/泌乳系统逻辑图。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.HediffComp_AbsorptionDelayTip.TicksToTimeString(System.Int32)
member.summary: 游戏内 2500 tick = 1 小时。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.Hediff_LactatingGain
member.summary: 药物诱发泌乳时的能力增益，健康页显示。capMods 由设置与 Lactating severity 动态计算。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.Hediff_ProlactinTolerance
member.summary: Provides safe tooltip for 催乳素耐受; avoids "Error getting tip text" from vanilla DrugEffectFactor comp.

member.name: P:MilkCum.Milk.Comps.Hediff_ProlactinTolerance.TipString
member.summary: RimWorld 部分版本中 Hediff.TipString 非 virtual，用 new 隐藏基类成员以避免编译错误；悬停时仍会显示安全文案。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.Data.BreastPoolEntry
member.summary: 单乳池条目：稳定 key（Part.def.defName 或 defName_index）、容量、流速倍率（× basePerDay 得每日流速）、是否左侧（用于左/右汇总）、对序号（同一对左右共享同一 PairIndex，用于按对撑大与挤奶顺序）。

member.name: P:MilkCum.Milk.Data.BreastPoolEntry.FlowMultiplier
member.summary: 该乳的流速倍率，与 GetMilkFlowMultipliersFromRJW 同源；调用方 × basePerDay 得每日流速。

member.name: P:MilkCum.Milk.Data.BreastPoolEntry.PairIndex
member.summary: 第几对乳房（0=第一对）；同一对的左乳与右乳共享同一值，用于按对撑大与挤奶从第一对开始选侧。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.Data.LactationPoolState
member.summary: 水池模型：双池状态与推进逻辑。不持有 Pawn，容量/流速由调用方传入；便于测试与 Comp 职责分离。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Data.LactationPoolState.TickGrowth(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: 双池进水：先填满两侧基础容量；仅当两侧都满（≥基础容量）后才允许撑大（至 stretchCap），超出部分溢出。返回本 tick 溢出量。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Data.LactationPoolState.TickShrink(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: 排水后回缩：超出基础容量部分乘以 shrinkFactor（0~1），shrinkFactor 越小回缩越快；可含健康度系数。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Data.LactationPoolState.UpdateFullPoolCounter(System.Single,System.Int32)
member.summary: 更新连续满池 tick 计数：总水位 >= 阈值则累加 deltaTicks，否则置 0。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Data.LactationPoolState.SingleBreastTickGrowth(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: 单乳池进水：当前水位 + 本 tick 流速，先填至 baseCap 再允许撑大至 stretchCap，超出部分溢出。返回 (新水位, 本 tick 溢出量)。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.HediffComp_Chargeable_Patch.GreedyConsume_Prefix(Verse.HediffComp_Chargeable,System.Single@,System.Single)
member.summary: 吸奶时从池扣量：按「从第一对开始、选最满一侧、依次吃到饱」从 CompEquallyMilkable 扣奶，再同步 Charge（见 Docs/泌乳系统逻辑图）。

member.summary: Childcare-capable mech/animal don't play with themselves as babies Patching JobOnThing to be compatible with Surrogate Mechanoid that uses JobOnThing directly

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.WorkGiverPatches.CanCreateManualFeedingJob_Prefix(Verse.Pawn,Verse.Thing,System.Boolean@)

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.WorkGiverPatches.CopyFrom_Prefix(RimWorld.StorageSettings,RimWorld.StorageSettings)
member.summary: Fix null reference when used with VEF

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.CumpilationIntegration
member.summary: 本 Mod 已合并 Cumpilation：为精液物品打产主(producer)，食用规则与奶制品一致(CompShowProducer + allowedConsumers)。 桶可关联床：仅床主可用空桶；占用时提示“不是你的桶”；共享卧室=混合精液。 7.13: 单源(ExtractCum、DeflateBucket 单主、Gathering from sex)设 producer；混合桶/清洁污物回收不设 producer。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.CumpilationIntegration.JobGiver_Deflate_TryFindBucketFor_Postfix(Verse.Pawn,Verse.Thing@,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Only allow bucket if CompCumBucketLink.CanPawnUse(pawn); otherwise clear result and prompt "not your cum bucket" when occupied. TryFindBucketFor returns bool and has (Pawn, out Thing).

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.CumpilationIntegration.GetProducerFromBucketDeflate(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: From JobDriver_DeflateBucket instance and current fluid, get the pawn to use as producer by reading cumflationHediff's SourceStorage sources (same fluid, pick by weight).

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.HaulAIUtility_Patch.HaulToCellStorageJob_Prefix(Verse.AI.Job@,Verse.Thing,Verse.IntVec3)
member.summary: Fix starting job 10 time error when trying to fill hopper with labeled human milk This fixes a missing check in vanilla code

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.CompProperties_Milkable_Patch.Postfix(RimWorld.CompProperties_Milkable)
member.summary: Replace CompMilkable with CompEquallyMilkable；仅改 compClass，不阻止原构造执行，兼容未来原版/第三方构造逻辑。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.ThingWithComps_Patch.InitializeComps_Post(Verse.ThingWithComps)
member.summary: Ensure EquallyMilkable Comp on Pawn；ExtensionHelper.CompEquallyMilkable() 内部已 if (TryGetComp==null) AddComp，不会重复添加。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.Hediff_Pregnant_Patch.DoBirthSpawn_Prefix(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 设计原则 2/7：仅 Prefix 挂接，不替换原版 DoBirthSpawn。分娩结束时为母亲添加 Lactating 并调用 ApplyBirthPoolValues；动物与人类（Biotech）统一处理。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.Need_Food_Patch.GetTipString_PostFix(RimWorld.Need_Food,System.String@)
member.summary: Add hunger rate from lactating to food need tip string

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.Need_NeedInterval_Patch
member.summary: 泌乳灌满期间按 ExtraNutritionPerDay 施加额外饥饿；basis 控制倍率(150=1:1)。统一使用 comp.ExtraNutritionPerDay() 避免与 HediffComp 逻辑分叉。池满时 ExtraNutritionPerDay 已为 0，此处再按当前 Fullness 做一次满池判断，避免执行顺序导致多扣。回缩吸收：满池回缩时 GetReabsorbedNutritionPerDay > 0，本补丁按同样 basis 将吸收量加回饱食度。设计原则 6：仅 Postfix 追加，不替换原版 NeedInterval 主逻辑。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.HediffSet_Remove_Patch
member.summary: Lactating 被任意方式移除时（含其他 mod 直接 RemoveHediff）同步清空双池，保证池与 hediff 一致。本 mod 内通过 ResetAndRemoveLactating 会先 ClearPools 再 RemoveHediff，此处兜底。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.AnimalProductionUtility_Patch
member.summary: 绕过香草可挤奶比较统计条目：将 GetCompProperties<CompProperties_Milkable> 替换为返回 null，原版产奶行不显示；本 mod 用 RaceProperties.SpecialDisplayStats 显示产奶。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.RaceProperties_Patch
member.summary: Add accurate stat defs to all milkable pawns

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.RaceProperties_Patch.SpecialDisplayStats_PostFix(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{RimWorld.StatDrawEntry}@,RimWorld.StatRequest)
member.summary: replace vanilla stat entries EM ones

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.RaceProperties_Patch.GetSpecialDisplayStats(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{RimWorld.StatDrawEntry},RimWorld.StatRequest)
member.summary: Generate the stat entries for milkable pawns

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.ProlactinAddictionPatch
member.summary: 设计原则 1：耐受/成瘾交给原版。本补丁仅挂接服用催乳剂后的「水池模型」逻辑（移除刚加的 Lactating、入队延迟、AddFromDrug）；成瘾判定与概率、耐受增减由原版 ChemicalDef + CompProperties_Drug + outcomeDoers/SeverityPerDay 驱动，此处不手写。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.PoolModelBirthHelper
member.summary: 水池模型：分娩时对 Lactating 应用剩余天数+=10、当前泌乳量+=基础值。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.Hediff_TipString_BreastPool_Patch
member.summary: 健康页：乳房 hediff 悬停时追加该乳/该对奶量与容量（左乳：x/x, 右乳：x/x）。见 Docs/泌乳系统逻辑图。目标方法 get_TipString 在部分 RimWorld 版本中可能不存在，故不参与 PatchAll，改为 Init 时按需手动 Patch；若为 GetTipString() 则一并 Patch 以兼容。健康页实际使用 HealthCardUtility.GetTooltip 与 TipStringExtra，故同时 Patch GetTooltip 确保悬停能显示。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.HealthCardUtility_GetTooltip_BreastPool_Patch
member.summary: 健康页悬停由 HealthCardUtility.GetTooltip(Pawn, BodyPartRecord) 构建。本 Patch 在该方法返回的 tooltip 后追加一行「左乳：x/x，右乳：x/x」。目标方法用字符串 "GetTooltip" 避免编译时 CS0117。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.WorkGiver_Ingest_MilkProductFilter
member.summary: 分配进食任务时排除不允许食用的奶制品。目标方法在 1.6 可能在不同程序集，故不参与 PatchAll，由 ApplyOptionalPatches 在找到时再打补丁。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.JobDriver_Ingest_MilkProductCheck
member.summary: 进食开始时再次校验：若食物带 CompShowProducer.producer 且食用者不在允许范围内，则结束进食任务。目标在 1.6 可能在不同程序集，可选应用。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.Patch_PostIngested_PartnerAteMyProduct
member.summary: 7.5：食用者吃完带产主的奶/精液制品后，若食用者是产主的伴侣，给产主轻微正面记忆。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.HarmonyPatches.Bill_Production_Notify_IterationCompleted_Patch
member.summary: When a recipe completes, copy producer/producerKind from milk ingredients to products that have CompShowProducer (e.g. Milk made from EM_HumanMilk).

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.PoolModelConstants
member.summary: 水池模型常量：规格第七节、第一节、十四节已定。详见 记忆库/domain/代码常量与公式对应。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.PoolModelConstants.BaseValueT
member.summary: 基础值_T（B_T）：每日基础衰减 = 1/(B_T×有效药效系数)。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.PoolModelConstants.BaseValueTBirth
member.summary: 分娩时 L 增量（不乘有效药效系数），单位与 L 一致（归一化容量）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.PoolModelConstants.EffectiveDrugFactorMin
member.summary: 有效药效系数下限：max(1−耐受, 0.05)。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.PoolModelConstants.NegativeFeedbackK
member.summary: 负反馈系数 k：每日衰减 = 1/(B_T×E) + k×L。τ≈1/k 游戏日。建议 [0.002, 0.05]。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.PoolModelConstants.LactationEndEpsilon
member.summary: L 下限：L 小于此值时视为 0，泌乳结束。避免浮点长期接近 0 不结束。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.PoolModelConstants.BaseAbsorptionDelayTicks
member.summary: 吸收延迟：基准 tick 数（0.25 游戏日）。实际延迟 = BaseAbsorptionDelayTicks × factor，factor = Lerp(1.5, 0.5, InverseLerp(0.25, 2, Clamp(代谢率, 0.25, 2)))，不做除法避免爆炸。见 记忆库/decisions/ADR-002-吸收延迟基准。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.PoolModelConstants.StretchCapFactor
member.summary: 满池撑大：单侧最大水位 = HalfPool × StretchCapFactor（规格：暂时允许超过基础容量）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.PoolModelConstants.OverflowFilthThreshold
member.summary: 溢出污物：累计溢出量达到此阈值时生成 1 格地面污物（不扣水位）。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.PoolModelConstants.ShrinkPerStep
member.summary: 排水后回缩：每 30 tick 超出基础容量部分乘以 (1 - ShrinkPerStep)，约 0.5 游戏日回缩到基础容量。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.PoolModelConstants.DoseToLFactor
member.summary: 剂量转 L 系数 C_dose：ΔL = Δs × C_dose × E_tol(t_before)。默认 1。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.PoolModelConstants.NutritionPerPoolUnit
member.summary: 1 池单位对应的营养：ExtraNutritionPerDay = flow × 本值；改池容量或 L 单位时只改此处即可保持平衡。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.DubsBadHygieneIntegration
member.summary: 可选联动：Dubs Bad Hygiene。当 DBH 已加载时，乳腺炎/堵塞的「卫生」触发可基于 DBH 的 Hygiene 需求；否则使用房间清洁度。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.DubsBadHygieneIntegration.IsDubsBadHygieneActive
member.summary: Dubs Bad Hygiene 是否已加载（存在 Hygiene NeedDef 或检测到 DBH 模组）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.DubsBadHygieneIntegration.GetHygieneRiskFactorForMastitis(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 卫生风险系数 0~1（1=最易诱发乳腺炎）。当启用 DBH 联动时用 Hygiene 需求等级（低=高风险）；否则用当前房间清洁度（脏=高风险）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.HasDrugInducedLactation(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 是否有药物诱发的泌乳（催乳素耐受或成瘾），用于显示/添加「药物泌乳负担」等。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.IsInLactatingState(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 统一泌乳判断：本体 Lactating 或 RJW 系 Lactating_Drug / Lactating_Permanent / Heavy_Lactating_Permanent。带 60 tick 缓存。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.ClearLactatingStateCache(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 清除泌乳缓存（如 hediff 变更时可调，非必须）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.AllowedToBreastFeed(Verse.Pawn,Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 指定“谁可以使用我的奶”：产奶者名单，默认预填子女+伴侣；吸奶与挤奶均按此名单。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetDefaultSucklers(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 获取默认“可使用我的奶”名单：子女 + 伴侣（用于名单为空时预填，不再用“空=默认”判断）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.IsAllowedSuckler(Verse.Pawn,Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 挤奶/吸奶时是否“自愿”：产主允许 doer 使用奶（名单内即可；名单默认预填子女+伴侣）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.CanConsumeMilkProduct(Verse.Pawn,Verse.Thing)
member.summary: 指定谁可以使用产出的奶/精液制品：无 producer 允许；自己始终允许；否则看产主 allowedConsumers，空=仅产主本人（囚犯/奴隶亦同，不默认允许殖民者，见 7.4）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetBedOwner(RimWorld.Building_Bed)
member.summary: 床的分配对象（床主）。兼容无 AssigningPawn 的 RimWorld 版本，通过 CompAssignableToPawn 获取。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.TryGiveFirstLactationBirthMemory(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 分娩后首次泌乳成就类记忆；仅当尚未拥有该记忆时发放，供原版/RJW 分娩入口统一调用。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.IsLeftPart(System.String)
member.summary: Part.def.defName 是否为左乳（StartsWith("LeftBreast") 或 "Left"），避免 Contains("Left") 误伤 LeftoverBreast。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.IsRightPart(System.String)
member.summary: Part.def.defName 是否为右乳（StartsWith("RightBreast") 或 "Right"）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetVirtualBreastPools(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 虚拟左右池容量（仅计算层，不修改任何 Hediff）。每个 hediff 表示一对乳房：左/右各为该 hediff 的 Severity×系数；多 hediff 时左右均为所有 hediff 容量之和（总容量=2×和）。容量允许 0（乳退化）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetLeftBreastCapacityFactor(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 左池容量：虚拟左池，不修改 Hediff。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetRightBreastCapacityFactor(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 右池容量：虚拟右池，不修改 Hediff。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetBreastCapacityFactors(Verse.Pawn,System.Single@,System.Single@)
member.summary: 左池/右池容量。仅计算层虚拟左右池：未启用 RJW 乳房尺寸时人形 0.5+0.5；否则每个 hediff 表示一对乳房，左右均为所有 hediff 容量之和（总容量=2×和）。不调用 AddHediff/RemoveHediff。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetBreastPoolEntries(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 按单乳枚举池条目（虚拟左右池，不修改 Hediff）。每个 hediff 表示一对乳房：产生 _L/_R 两键，容量各为该 hediff 的 Severity×系数。同一对共享 PairIndex。见 记忆库/design/双池与PairIndex。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetMilkFlowMultiplierFromConditions(Verse.Pawn,Verse.BodyPartRecord)
member.summary: 规格：乳腺炎/堵塞等健康影响进水流速。返回 1f 减去乳房不适类 hediff 的惩罚（severity×0.5），最小 0.5。part 为 null 时按全身（任一乳腺炎即生效）；part 非空时仅当该部位的乳腺炎生效，对应「哪对乳房的哪一侧」。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetPoolKeyFromSideKey(System.String)
member.summary: 从侧 key（如 HumanBreast_L）得到池 key（HumanBreast）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetPartForPoolKey(Verse.Pawn,System.String)
member.summary: 该对乳房（poolKey）对应的身体部位，用于按部位的状态（如乳腺炎）判定。无对应 hediff 时返回 null。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetConditionsForSide(Verse.Pawn,System.String)
member.summary: 指定侧（sideKey，如 poolKey_L）的状态系数，用于流速与 UI 按「该乳房该侧」显示。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetMilkFlowMultiplierFromGenes(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: RJW-Genes 兼容：基因对泌乳流速的倍率。无基因或未安装 rjw-genes 时返回 1f；如 rjw_genes_big_breasts / rjw_genes_extra_breasts 等可略微提高流速。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetMilkFlowMultiplierFromRJW_Left(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 左乳流速倍率：与容量一致，每个 hediff 表示一对，所有 hediff 的 fluidMultiplier 之和计入左。未启用 RJW 乳房尺寸时 0.5。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetMilkFlowMultiplierFromRJW_Right(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 右乳流速倍率：与容量一致，每个 hediff 表示一对，所有 hediff 的 fluidMultiplier 之和计入右。未启用时 0.5。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetMilkFlowMultipliersFromRJW(Verse.Pawn,System.Single@,System.Single@)
member.summary: 左右池流速倍率（与容量一致：每个 hediff 表示一对，左/右均为所有 hediff 的 fluidMultiplier 之和）。未启用或空列表时 0.5/0.5。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetPoolKeyForBreastHediff(Verse.Pawn,Verse.Hediff)
member.summary: 健康页悬停：给定乳房 hediff（须在 GetBreastList 中），返回其对应的池 key（与 GetBreastPoolEntries 一致）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetFlowPerDayForBreastPair(Verse.Pawn,System.String)
member.summary: 该对乳房的左右乳产奶流速（池单位/天）及各自流速倍率；流速按侧含压力与喷乳反射。单次遍历条目。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetPressureFactorForSide(Verse.Pawn,System.String)
member.summary: 指定侧（poolKey_L / poolKey_R）的压力系数，用于健康页因子行按侧显示。P = 该侧满度/该侧撑大容量。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetPoolEntriesForBreastHediff(Verse.Pawn,Verse.Hediff)
member.summary: 健康页悬停（多乳）：返回该 hediff 对应的所有池条目（1 条为单侧乳，2 条为拆成 _L/_R 的一对），用于显示「左乳：奶量/容量, 右乳：奶量/容量」。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetBreastOrChestPart(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 获取“乳房/胸部”身体部位，用于将 hediff 挂在健康页的乳房行。优先 Breast，否则 Chest（RJW），否则 Torso。无合适部位时返回 null（hediff 将显示为全身）。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Helpers.ExtensionHelper.GetGenitalsPart(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 获取“生殖器”身体部位，用于将精液相关 hediff 挂在健康页的生殖器行。优先使用 RJW Genital_Helper.get_genitalsBPR，否则从身体中找 Genitals 或 Anus。无合适部位时返回 null。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.Jobs.JobDriver_EquallyMilk.workTotal
member.summary: 按容量量化：本次挤奶所需工作量，由 MilkAmount 与池满度计算。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.Jobs.JobDriver_EquallyMilk.GetWorkTotal
member.summary: 按容量量化：工作量 = 基准 × (1 + 容量系数×(MilkAmount-1)) × (0.5+0.5×池满度)，有上下限。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.StatWorker_EqualMilkingPawnOnly
member.summary: 仅对 Pawn 请求显示；避免在查看 ThingDef（如药物 EM_Prolactin）信息卡时触发原版 StatWorker 的未处理分支并报 "Unhandled case"。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.Thoughts.ThoughtWorker_AddictionSatisfied
member.summary: 10.8-5：当成瘾处于满足阶段时显示小幅正面心情。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.Thoughts.ThoughtWorker_HighToleranceLowMilk
member.summary: 建议 9：高耐受且当前泌乳量(L)偏低时，产生轻微挫败感心情。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.Thoughts.ThoughtWorker_LongTermDrugLactation

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.Thoughts.ThoughtWorker_LongTimeNotMilked

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.Thoughts.ThoughtWorker_ProlactinWithdrawal

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.World.PendingLactatingEntry
member.summary: 吸收延迟待生效条目：到 endTick 时给 pawn 添加 Lactating 并执行 AddFromDrug(deltaSeverity)。见 Docs/泌乳系统逻辑图。

member.name: F:MilkCum.Milk.World.PendingLactatingEntry.toleranceBefore
member.summary: 吃药前的耐受严重度 t_before，用于计算 Δs 与 E_tol。

member.name: T:MilkCum.Milk.World.WorldComponent_EqualMilkingAbsorptionDelay
member.summary: 水池模型吸收延迟：吃药后延迟一段时间再挂 Lactating 并进水，延迟由代谢率决定。见 Docs/泌乳系统逻辑图。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.World.WorldComponent_EqualMilkingAbsorptionDelay.RemoveInvalidPendingEntries
member.summary: 加载后移除 pawn 为 null 或已销毁的条目，避免跨存档/地图引用。见 Docs/泌乳系统逻辑图。

member.summary: 10.8-4：药物生效后的心情效果（愉悦记忆 + 大剂量兴奋 hediff），供延迟生效与无 World 立即生效共用。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.World.WorldComponent_EqualMilkingAbsorptionDelay.GetAbsorptionDelayTicks(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 根据代谢率计算吸收延迟 tick。用 Lerp 映射 rate→倍率(0.5~1.5)，不做除法，避免 rate 极小或负值时爆炸。原版 MetabolicRate 可为 0.01、负数等。

member.name: M:MilkCum.Milk.World.WorldComponent_EqualMilkingAbsorptionDelay.GetRemainingTicksForPawn(Verse.Pawn)

member.name: F:MilkCum.RJW.RJWLactatingBreastSizeGameComponent.BreastBaseSeverity

member.name: M:MilkCum.RJW.RJWSexAndFertility.ApplyPostSexLactationBoost(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: 3.2：性行为后为泌乳者增加少量池进水（若设置开启）。

member.name: T:Cumpilation.Bukkake.BukkakeUtility
member.summary:
Initializes and Manages both the "Per Body-Part" Splashes on Bukkake as well as their controllers.
DevNote: Initially, the Bukkake implementation from Ed86-Cum had two mechanics that got removed. 1) The body-parts had a "Overspill" logic which means that if your chest was full, you'd get splashes on the arms and legs. 2) The Controller would calculate itself regularly. This is now done upon spawning parts and the controller just ticks down.
Also, all drawing got removed. The drawing framework people should take care of that (#Innocent)

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Bukkake.BukkakeUtility.CanBeCovered(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: Simple check if the pawn can be covered with fluids. Only some sanity checks and ruling animals out.
member.param: The pawn that might be covered.
member.returns: True if the pawn can be covered by fluid, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Bukkake.BukkakeUtility.PartitionSeverity(System.Single,System.Int32,System.Single)
member.summary: Partitions a float into a sub-list of smaller floats whose sum is the initialSeverity. There will be atmost 3 * initialseverity parts, or max_parts, whatever is smaller. The size of each partition is capped at 1.0 (default).
member.param: Max number of partitions to create, default capped at 10
Max value for each entry, default capped at 1.0
member.returns: A list of floats whose sum is the original severity.

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Bukkake.BukkakeUtility.TicksToCleanSplashFromSelf(Verse.Hediff,System.Single)
member.summary: Looks up the ticks (time) required to clean a splash from a body-part. In case of any error, null value or other issues, 240 (2s) is returned, which was the original cleanup time from frameworks. If the severity is lower (or higher) than 1, it is considerd as a linear co-efficient.

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Bukkake.HediffCompProperties_SpawnOrAdjustControllerHediff.summedSeverityRequiredForFullController
member.summary: How many of the sub-hediffs severity are required to have a 1.0 Severity of the corresponding Controller. Default 4.5 "full" (=Severity 1.0) parts to reach the full bukkake. For a normal pawn, there should be 6 or 7 bodyparts, so 4.5 is already quite a lot.

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Common.DefModExtension_PawnTargetting.blockingHediffs
member.summary: A list of hediffs that block spawning of this Hediff. If any is present, at any severity other than 0, `CanTargetPawn` will return false.

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Common.FluidUtility.StoreFluidSource(Verse.Hediff,Verse.Pawn,rjw.SexFluidDef,System.Single)
member.summary: Tries to store a record of `FluidSource` in a given Hediff. In case the Hediff does not have a `HediffComp_SourceStorage` nothing will happen. If there already exists a Storage Entry for this Pawn and this fluid, it will be increased by the incoming amount.
member.param: The hediff to store a record in
The pawn that originated the Fluid
The type of fluid
The amount of fluid

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Common.FluidUtility.LikesCumflation(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: Returns true if the pawn likes cumflation / cumstuffing for one or the other reason. Important: This is a separate method intentionally, so it can be patched.
member.param: The pawn that maybe likes cumflation
member.returns: True, if the pawn likes cumflation from traits, quirks or zoophile.

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Common.HediffCompProperties_RandomlySpawnFilth.chanceBasedOnSeverity
member.summary: Scale the chance based on severity. If Chance is 50% and Severity is 50%, then there is a 25% final chance.

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Common.HediffCompProperties_RandomlySpawnFilth.onlyAtStagesHigherThan
member.summary: Only try to spawn filth if the current stage is higher than the specified number.

member.name: T:Cumpilation.Common.HediffComp_ChangeFluidfactorBasedOnSeverity
member.summary:
Adjusts the targetted SexParts fluid-amount based on a linear factor between a configured Max and Min value.
Example: Max 5, Min 2 Severity 100% -> 5.0 Severity 50% -> 3.5 Severity 0% -> 2.0 Severity 33% -> 3.0 Severity 66% -> 4.0 Severity 250% -> 5.0

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Common.IngestionOutcomeDoer_PawnTargetting.blockingHediffs
member.summary: A list of hediffs that block spawning of this Hediff. If any is present, at any severity other than 0, `CanTargetPawn` will return false.

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Common.MapUtility.PawnIsOnHomeMap(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary:
Checks if the pawn is on the players home map.
Reason is that drones should only be punished for absence of queen if they are on the map and there is no queen. If they are on a mission, transport-pod etc. they should not get boni or mali.
member.param: The pawn for which to check map-presence.
member.returns: True if the pawn is on the home-map, False otherwise.

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Common.PartUtility.FindFittingSexParts(Verse.Pawn,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
This method finds all relevant, targetted parts as specified.
A sanity check, if the pawn is valid / healthy and matches the configuration, is done earlier in `IsValidPawn`.
member.param: The pawn for which to find SexParts.
Consider Penises (using `RJW.PartHelper.Is_Penis`)
Consider Vaginas (using `RJW.PartHelper.Is_Vagina`)
Consider Breasts (using HomeBrew helper)
Consider Anus (using `RJW.PartHelper.Is_Anus`)
Consider SexParts that are not in any other category
only return the first (fitting) part.
only return parts that have fluid.
member.returns: All targetted SexParts of the pawn, or an empty List on Errors.

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Common.PartUtility.IsValidPawn(Verse.Pawn,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Verse.HediffDef},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{RimWorld.TraitDef},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Does a bunch of checks on a pawn, if it is a valid target.
member.param: The pawn to check
Men are valid targets (Using RW.Gender)
Women are valid targets (using RW.Gender)
Futas are valid targets (using RJW.GenderUtility.IsFuta); Futa is checked before men and women.
Animals are valid targets.
Return an empty list if any of the HediffDefs is present at a severity other than 0.
member.returns: True if the pawn is a valid target, false if it cannot be targeted

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Cumflation.CumflationUtility.CanBeCumflated(Verse.Pawn)
member.summary: Modding - Hook. Default: All Pawns can be cumflated. Animals cannot be cumflated.
member.param: The pawn that might be cumflated.

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Cumflation.CumflationUtility.DetermineCumflationSeverity(Verse.Pawn,System.Single,rjw.SexFluidDef)
member.summary:
Calculates the resulting Cumflation-Severity relative to the fluid-amount and pawns body size. Also used to determine "overflow".
This method is also used to determine "cumstuffed" despite the name.
member.param: The pawn that might be cumflated
The amount of fluid coming in.
FluidDef, optional for patching.
member.returns: The severity of the resulting cumflation

member.name: M:Cumpilation.Cumflation.CumflationUtility.FluidAmountRequiredToCumflatePawn(Verse.Pawn,rjw.SexFluidDef)
member.summary:
We assume a simple relation: 100 fluid per 1 Bodysize. The returning value will determine how much of the fluid is necessary for 1.0 cumflation severity.
This might be altered with Patches etc. or extra behaviour, which is why this is a separate method despite very simple logic.
member.param: The pawn for which
Optional for patches: For which fluid to check.
member.returns: A number how much fluid amount is necessary for a "full" cumflation, i.E. a cumflation result resulting in 1.0 cumflation severity.

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Cumflation.StuffingDef.resultingStuffedHediff
member.summary: Note: The Cumstuffed Hediff MUST have a `HediffComp_SharedSeverityPerDay` otherwise there will be issues.

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Cumflation.StuffingDef.amountOfFluidForFullStuffing
member.summary: The amount of Fluid required for making a 1.0 Severity Hediff of the relative xxx-stuffing.

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Cumflation.StuffingDef.thoughtThreshold
member.summary: How much severity does the resulting stuffing must have to give a thought?

member.name: T:Cumpilation.Cumflation.HediffCompProperties_SharedSeverityPerDay
member.summary:
Extension to the "HediffComp_SeverityPerDay" that adjusts depending on how many Hediffs with this Comp are present.
Example: You have 1 hediff with `-0.10` SeverityPerDay. It will behave as normal. Example 2: You have 3 hediffs with `-0.15` SeverityPerDay each. Because you have three, they will effectively reduce by `-0.05` each day, resulting in a "global" reduction of 0.15 amongst all.

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Cumflation.HediffCompProperties_VomitFluidMtb.mtbDays
member.summary: "mean time between" measured in days. If set to 1, there will be 1 vomiting per days (in random occurrence). If set to 2, there will be 0.5 vomiting per days, etc. If set to 0.1, there will be 10 vomitings per days

member.name: F:Cumpilation.Cumflation.HediffCompProperties_VomitFluidMtb.scaleWithSeverity
member.summary: If true, the "chance" of application is scaled with the Severity of the Stuffing. So if your stuffing is 1.0, it will have a "full mtbDays". Otherwise, if your stuffing is 0.5, it will will result in half as much Vomiting.

member.name: T:Cumpilation.Cumflation.HediffComp_SharedSeverityPerDay
member.summary:
Extension to the "HediffComp_SeverityPerDay" that adjusts depending on how many Hediffs with this Comp are present.
Example: You have 1 hediff with `-0.10` SeverityPerDay. It will behave as normal. Example 2: You have 3 hediffs with `-0.15` SeverityPerDay each. Because you have three, they will effectively reduce by `-0.05` each day, resulting in a "global" reduction of 0.15 amongst all.

Unlike `FluidGatheringBuilding` that works upon nearby sex, the PassiveFluidGatherer is trying to clean nearby floors from Filth. Due to logic, they must be in the same room.

To work, there need to be two defs: - A RecordFluidMappingDef - The IngestionOutComeDoer
Originally, this was from Amaverashi-Sexperience but extended for multiple fluids. https://gitgud.io/amevarashi/rjw-sexperience/-/blob/master/Source/RJWSexperience/Cum/IngestionOutcomeDoer_RecordEatenCum.cs?ref_type=heads

member.name: T:Cumpilation.Reactions.Patches.Patch_IngestMeal_UpdateRecordAndGiveThoughts
member.summary:
I have one IngestionOutcomeDoer but it's not enough. The individual outcome-doers are not used in meals. This triggers all (relevant) ingredients to give their thoughts. This also means that if a meal is made of cum and insect jelly, the eater will get two thoughts.
TODO: Right now, the "NumEaten" is updated, but the "AmountEaten" is buggy. But as it gives the right thoughts, I am decently happy for now.

member.name: F:HediffWithComps_EqualMilkingLactating.SeverityStepsPerUnit
member.summary: Granularity: 4 steps per severity (0.25). Stage table covers 0..MaxSeverityForStages; higher severity uses last stage. maxSteps=81, count=162; if future allows severity>20 (e.g. large dose), display stays at last stage—not a bug, just a note.

member.name: M:HediffWithComps_EqualMilkingLactating.OnGatheredLetdownByKeys(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: 挤奶/吸奶后按被扣量的池侧添加喷乳反射刺激（仅被操作的该侧 R 升高）。

member.name: M:HediffWithComps_EqualMilkingLactating.GenStages
member.summary: 设计原则 5：stages 由 XML 移除，此处 C# 动态生成；capMods 在 GenStage 内设置（当前 Clear 由 EM_LactatingGain 等独立 Hediff 提供能力），避免与 Def 静态阶段冲突。

member.name: M:HediffWithComps_EqualMilkingLactating.GenStage(Verse.HediffStage@,System.Single,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Stage 名（括号内）：仅当真正不衰减时显示「永久」，否则留空；具体「天数：X」在 CompLabelInBracketsExtra 动态显示。

member.name: F:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.currentLactationAmount
member.summary: 水池模型（L 驱动）：当前泌乳量 L。唯一状态量；每日衰减 = 1/(B_T×E)+k×L；泌乳结束 L≤0。

member.name: F:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.letdownReflexByKey
member.summary: 四层模型：喷乳反射 R∈[0,1]，按「哪对乳房的哪一侧」分别存储（key 与 breastFullness 一致，如 HumanBreast_L）。挤奶/吸奶某侧仅提升该侧 R。

member.name: F:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.currentInflammation
member.summary: 四层模型：炎症负荷 I≥0。每 30 tick 离散更新；I>I_crit 触发乳腺炎。

member.name: F:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.milkingLStimulusAccumulatedThisDay
member.summary: 挤奶 L 刺激：当日已累计量，每游戏日重置。

member.name: F:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.effectiveToleranceE
member.summary: 耐受动态：有效耐受 E∈[0,1]，dE/dt = μ·L − ν·E；用于 E_tol 计算。

member.name: F:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.cachedWasPermanentLactation
member.summary: 上次判定时是否为永久泌乳，用于从非永久变为永久时 SetDirty 刷新阶段名。

member.name: P:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.RemainingDays
member.summary: 剩余天数（游戏日）。动力学 dL/dt = -(a+k×L)，精确解 T = (1/k)×ln(1 + k×L/a)；a=1/(B_T×E)。k→0 或 a≤0 时退化为 L/D(L)。

member.name: P:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.CurrentLactationAmount
member.summary: 当前泌乳量 L（规格：基础值 = 总容量，归一化 1）。

member.name: P:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.IsPermanentLactation
member.summary: 是否为永久泌乳（基因或动物设置）：L 不衰减；括号阶段名与悬停「剩余时间」均据此显示「永久」。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.UpdateToleranceDynamic(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: 耐受动态：dE/dt = μ·L − ν·E。Δt 单位：游戏日。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.GetEffectiveToleranceE
member.summary: 耐受动态：当前 E，供 GetProlactinToleranceFactor 使用。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.UpdateInflammation(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: 四层模型：炎症 I 离散更新。dI/dt = α·P² + β·Injury + γ·BadHygiene − ρ·I；Δt 单位：小时。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.TryTriggerMastitisFromInflammation
member.summary: 四层模型：若 I>I_crit 且允许乳腺炎，则挂 EM_Mastitis（与现有 MTB 判定并存）。启用质量时有效 I_crit 随 MilkQuality 提高。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.GetMilkQuality
member.summary: 四层模型（阶段3.3）：MilkQuality = f(Hunger, I) ∈ [0,1]。饱食度高、炎症低则质量高；未启用质量时返回 1。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.AddMilkingLStimulus
member.summary: 四层模型：挤奶/吸奶时 L 微幅刺激，单次与每日带上限。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.GetLetdownReflex
member.summary: 四层模型：当前喷乳反射 R∈[0,1]（用于总览显示）。未启用时返回 1；启用时为各侧 R 的加权平均，无数据时不低于 letdownReflexMin。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.GetLetdownReflexRaw(System.String)
member.summary: 指定侧（poolKey_L / poolKey_R）的 R 值；无记录时返回 0（流速倍率里会与 min 合并）。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.GetLetdownReflexForSide(System.String)
member.summary: 指定侧的 R，无记录时为 0（用于显示/平均）。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.GetLetdownReflexFlowMultiplier(System.String)
member.summary: 进水流速的 R 倍率（按侧）：加成模式时 = 1+R×(boost-1)；否则 = R（无记录时用 min）。用于该侧进水与 UI 因子。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.GetLetdownReflexFlowMultiplier
member.summary: 进水流速的 R 倍率（全侧平均，用于总产奶效率一行显示）。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.DecayLetdownReflex(System.Single)
member.summary: 四层模型：各侧 R 指数衰减；仅保留当前池中存在的 key，避免字典无限增长。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.AddLetdownReflexStimulus(System.String)
member.summary: 四层模型：挤奶/吸奶刺激该侧，R += ΔR，Clamp 至 1。仅被刺激的那一侧（如第一对的左乳）提升喷乳反射。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.GetBaseValueNormalized(Verse.Pawn)

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.GetEffectiveDrugFactor

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.FormatFlowFactor(System.Single)
member.summary: 流速因子显示用：整数显示为 "1"，否则保留 1～2 位小数。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.GetDailyLactationDecay

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.AddFromDrug(System.Single)
member.summary: 吃药时进水：ΔL = Δs × C_dose。Δs 为本次实际生效的 Lactating 严重度增量（已包含一次耐受削弱）。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.AddFromBirth

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.ResetAndRemoveLactating

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.ExtraNutritionPerDay
member.summary: 灌满期间额外营养/天：与产奶流速平衡，flow（池单位/天）× NutritionPerPoolUnit；满池后不额外消耗。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.ExtraEnergyPerDay
member.summary: 机械体灌满期间额外能量/天：与产奶流速 1:1 平衡，flowPerDay（池单位/天）× nutritionToEnergyFactor；满池后不额外消耗。

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.GetFlowPerDay

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.GetFlowPerDayBreakdown

member.name: T:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.FlowBreakdown

member.name: P:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.CompLabelInBracketsExtra

member.name: M:HediffComp_EqualMilkingLactating.SyncChargeFromPool
member.summary: 吸奶/消费后：仅将 Charge 同步为当前池总满度，并触发 OnGathered（不按比例缩放池，因已由 DrainForConsume 按对按侧扣过）。
